name: CodeIntegrity - Unmet WHQL Requirements For Loaded Kernel Module
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: CodeIntegrity - Unmet WHQL Requirements For Loaded Kernel Module
SIGMA Description: Detects loaded kernel modules that did not meet the WHQL signing requirements.

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('3082', '3083')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%system32\drivers\vsock.sys%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%system32\drivers\vmci.sys%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY CodeIntegrity - Unmet WHQL Requirements For Loaded Kernel Module on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('3082', '3083')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%system32\drivers\vsock.sys%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%system32\drivers\vmci.sys%'))) AQL filter query
